message:
fix(connectors): RetryLoop integration and path sanitization for observability connectors

Migrate amplitude, datadog, elasticsearch, grafana, mixpanel, segment,
and sentry connectors from manual request/response handling to the
unified RetryLoop::execute() + AttemptOutcome pattern from fcp-sdk.
Each connector now correctly classifies errors as retryable vs terminal
and respects retry-after headers from upstream APIs.

Add sanitize_path_segment() to amplitude and segment connectors to
reject path traversal attacks (../, encoded slashes) in user-supplied
IDs before URL interpolation.

Remove dead max_retries/initial_delay_ms fields from SentryClient,
superseded by the HttpRetryConfig-based approach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
